name: Creamy Chicken Primavera
recipeIngredient: 1 package Green Giant Pasta Accents -Primavera Frozen Vegetables-and Pasta (16 oz)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, brown the chicken in butter.
2. Add the vegetables and pasta with water. Cover and simmer for 7-9 minutes until the vegetables are crisp-tender, stirring occasionally.
3. Stir in the sour cream; heat thoroughly.
Prep time: 20 minutes.
